title: Unable to Schedule Drip + Admin Alert
summary: Runs a three-touch email sequence for unscheduled contacts while notifying the internal team.
businessOutcome: Keep unscheduled leads warm and visible instead of letting them disappear after one failed attempt.
thumbnail: Unscheduled contacts stay in motion until they book or reply.
problem: Contacts that fail to book once often get ignored unless someone manually restarts outreach.
solution: This workflow removes conflicts, alerts the team, and sends a timed three-email sequence designed to recover scheduling momentum.
workflowOverview: Delivers a spaced re-engagement drip automatically
audience: Appointment setters, intake teams, service businesses
